text:
We just shipped OrderFlow AI -- an open-source multi-agent system for Order-to-Cash automation.

What it does: 7 LangGraph agents (intake, inventory, ERP sync, fulfillment, invoice, reconciliation, exception handler) work together to orchestrate orders across your enterprise systems.

Tech stack: Python FastAPI backend with LangGraph orchestration, React/TypeScript frontend, PostgreSQL + Redis, all Dockerized.

Free and open source: https://github.com/phanindraintelligenzit-afk/orderflow-ai

Built by AgentsFactory.
